/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libengine.a CMakeFiles/engine.dir/data_storage/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/data_storage/batch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/data_storage/column.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/serialization/batch_serialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libengine.a
